text:
전체 길이 100mm 이상 조건이 적용되어 77개 후보가 검색되었습니다.

날 수 선호가 있으신가요? 4날(45개), 2날(26개), 6날(3개), 3날(3개) 중에서 선택하시거나 상관없으시면 말씀해 주세요.

displayedProducts.displayLabel: 4G MILL 6 Flute 45°Helix End mill
displayedProducts.description:
4G MILL 6 Flute
45°Helix End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
▶ Due to new coating and new tool geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear resistance.
▶ Excellent performance when cutting prehardened steels, up to HRc55 which are used for molds & dies.
▶ Due to 45 helix angle, better surface roughness can be achieved at side cutting.
▶ Available various effective length and overall length products.

displayedProducts.displayLabel: 4G MILL 4 Flute 38°Helix Long Neck Corner Radius End mill
displayedProducts.description:
4G MILL 4 Flute
38°Helix Long Neck
Corner Radius End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
Due to new coating and geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear-resistance.
Excellent for cutting pre-hardened steels, carbon steels and alloy steels of molds and dies up to HRc55 and machine parts.
Increasing cutting ability and minimizing tool wear according to reduction of vibration due to broken index of end teeth.

displayedProducts.displayLabel: 4G MILL 3 Flute 45°Helix Double Corner Radius End mill
displayedProducts.description:
4G MILL 3 Flute
45°Helix Double
Corner Radius End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
Improvement of wear-resistance according to reduction of cutting force due to double corner radii of end teeth.
High-speed and high-feed cutting are available and surface roughness is excellent.
Excellent machinability when finish cutting at bottom and rough cutting at profile work due to double corner radius design.

displayedProducts.description:

30°Helix Rib Corner Radius
End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
▶Due to new coating and new tool geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear resistance.
▶Excellent for cutting prehardened steels, carbon steels, alloy steels of molds and dies, up to HRc55 and machine parts.
▶Available various products like regular length and long shank end mills etc.
▶Available various corner radius end mills, from min. 0.02mm corner radius to max. 2.0 mm corner radius.
▶Available more various effective length and overall length end mills than previous standard products.

4G MILL 4 Flute
Multiple Helix
Corner Radius End mill
members.featureText:
▶Due to new coating and new tool geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear resistance.
▶Excellent performance when cutting prehardened steels, up to HRc55 which are used for molds & dies.
▶Due to Multiple Helix for 3.0mm and over 3.0mm diameter end mills, vibration can be minimized at cutting, and wear of cutting tool can be decreased too.
▶Available various products like short, regular and long shank end millls etc.

38°Helix Long Neck
Corner Radius End mill
members.featureText:
Due to new coating and geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear-resistance.
Excellent for cutting pre-hardened steels, carbon steels and alloy steels of molds and dies up to HRc55 and machine parts.
Increasing cutting ability and minimizing tool wear according to reduction of vibration due to broken index of end teeth.

members.displayLabel: 4G MILL 3 Flute 45°Helix Double Corner Radius End mill
members.description:
4G MILL 3 Flute
45°Helix Double
Corner Radius End mill
members.featureText:
Improvement of wear-resistance according to reduction of cutting force due to double corner radii of end teeth.
High-speed and high-feed cutting are available and surface roughness is excellent.
Excellent machinability when finish cutting at bottom and rough cutting at profile work due to double corner radius design.
